events.event_description: Jonathan Russell presented credentials as Minister Plenipotentiary at Stockholm, establishing the U.S. Legation to Sweden (and Norway).

evidence.quote: Jonathan Russell, Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1814-01-18. Credentials presented: 1818-04-29. Left post on 1818-10-22. Note: An earlier nomination of May 29, 1813, had been rejected by the Senate. Served at the court of Sweden and Norway; resident at Stockholm.

events.event_description: Harrison Freeman Matthews presented credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, elevating the U.S. mission in Stockholm from a Legation to an Embassy.

evidence.quote: Harrison Freeman Matthews, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1947-09-20. Credentials presented: 1947-12-05. Left post on 1950-05-24. Note: Commissioned during a recess of the Senate; recommissioned on December 9, 1947, after confirmation.
